inputs.label: Gigabytes
inputs.businessContext: Amount of data in gigabytes to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of data in gigabytes to convert.
businessContext_i18n.de: Datenmenge in Gigabyte, die umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de données en gigaoctets à convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de datos en gigabytes a convertir.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in the result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places in the result.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales dans le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales en el resultado.

inputs.label: Use Binary (1024)
inputs.businessContext: 1 for binary conversion (1 TB = 1024 GB), 0 for decimal (1 TB = 1000 GB).

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for binary conversion (1 TB = 1024 GB), 0 for decimal (1 TB = 1000 GB).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkili dönüşüm için 1 (1 TB = 1024 GB), ondalık için 0 (1 TB = 1000 GB).
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für binäre Umrechnung (1 TB = 1024 GB), 0 für dezimale (1 TB = 1000 GB).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 pour conversion binaire (1 To = 1024 Go), 0 pour décimal (1 To = 1000 Go).
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 para conversión binaria (1 TB = 1024 GB), 0 para decimal (1 TB = 1000 GB).
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 للتحويل الثنائي (1 تيرابايت = 1024 غيغابايت)، 0 للتحويل العشري (1 تيرابايت = 1000 غيغابايت).

inputs.label: Expected TB
inputs.businessContext: Optional known correct value in terabytes for verification.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional known correct value in terabytes for verification.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrulama için isteğe bağlı bilinen doğru değer (terabayt cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionaler bekannter korrekter Wert in Terabyte zur Überprüfung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur correcte connue optionnelle en téraoctets pour vérification.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor correcto conocido opcional en terabytes para verificación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة صحيحة معروفة اختيارية بالتيرابايت للتحقق.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
